channel.title: VIP Socio — Culture Events Feed
channel.description: The integrated platform for tickets, events, influencers, merch and services built for the Culture. Fresh event drops every day.

item.title: Midnight Sessions: Afrobeats & Amapiano — Brooklyn
item.description: Late-night Afrobeats and Amapiano session at The Underground. Sat, Apr 18, 10:00 PM. From $25.

item.title: The Cookout: R&B and BBQ — Atlanta
item.description: Day party with live R&B and community BBQ in Piedmont Park. Sat, Apr 18, 2:00 PM. From $40.

item.title: Sunday Service Day Party — Miami
item.description: Free rooftop day party at Rooftop 74. Sun, Apr 19, 3:00 PM. Free with RSVP.

item.title: Art & Soul: Gallery Opening — Washington DC
item.description: Gallery opening featuring emerging Black artists at District Arts. Fri, Apr 24, 9:00 PM. From $30.

item.title: Spoken Word: Open Mic Night — Houston
item.description: Spoken word open mic at The Hideout. Sat, Apr 25, 8:00 PM. From $15.

item.title: Afrobeat Rooftop Takeover — Los Angeles
item.description: Afrobeat rooftop takeover at Sky Lounge. Sun, Apr 26, 4:00 PM. From $35.

item.title: First Friday: Block Party — Detroit
item.description: First Friday block party in downtown Detroit. Fri, May 1, 7:00 PM. Free with RSVP.

item.title: House Music Warehouse Rave — Chicago
item.description: 21+ house music warehouse rave in Chicago. Sat, May 2, 11:00 PM. From $45.
